---
title: |
  \vspace*{\fill}
  \fontsize{34}{38}\selectfont \textbf {Crime Reporting Analytics Database}
author: |
  \fontsize{24}{28}\selectfont Seif H. Kungulio
date: |
  \fontsize{18}{22}\selectfont March 23, 2026
  \ \vspace*{\fill}
description: "Building a star schema database for Crime Reporting Analytics Database"
categories: [R, SQL, PostgreSQL, Database, Reporting]
tags: [RMarkdown, PostgreSQL, Star Schema, Data Engineering, Reporting]
output: 
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: false
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    highlight: espresso
    include:
      in_header: resources/header.tex
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \definecolor{brand}{HTML}{000000}
  - \definecolor{subbrand}{HTML}{212121}
  - \usepackage{titlesec}
  - \titleformat{\section}{\Large\bfseries\color{brand}}{\thesection}{1em}{}
  - \titleformat{\subsection}{\large\bfseries\color{subbrand}}{\thesubsection}{0.75em}{}
  - \usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
  - \tcbset{colback=white, colframe=brand, coltitle=white, fonttitle=\bfseries}
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhead[L]{\textcolor{brand}{Crime Reporting Analytics Database}}
  - \fancyhead[R]{\textcolor{subbrand}{Seif H. Kungulio}}
  - \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

\pagenumbering{gobble}

\newpage
\thispagestyle{plain}
&nbsp;

\newpage
\pagenumbering{roman}
\tableofcontents

\newpage
\pagenumbering{arabic}

# Introduction
